provenance.notes: Genesis supply and generation pattern are sourced from the contract. Other special-category groupings remain placeholders.

genesis.label: Genesis Cats
genesis.notes: Supply cap and generation formula are verified from contract source. The canonical-derived genesis rescue-order-index bucket lives in data/rescue-buckets.json and is not a bytes5 catId list.

earlyRescue.label: Early Rescue Cats
earlyRescue.notes: Range and membership rules need sourced definitions.

contractDefined.label: Contract-defined Special Cats
contractDefined.notes: Currently includes Genesis-related source facts only; add other contract-defined categories only after verification.

communityCurated.label: Community-curated Special Cats
communityCurated.notes: Requires explicit curator notes and source references.

todos: Separate canonical protocol categories from community-curated categories.
Add exact membership only after source verification.
Materialize Genesis IDs only after deciding the repo convention for MoonCat ID strings.
Document the derivation method for the canonical-derived genesis rescue-order bucket before downstream use.
Define conversion from rescue-order-index to catId/token-facing identifiers if needed.
